chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.242 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case For hearing of M.A. No.3548/2025 --------------------------------------------- 08.05.2025 Mr. Ali Akbar Abro, advocate for applicant Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. Mr. Shafqat Gul Malik, advocate for respondents ------------------------------ Applicants Muhammad Shahzad, Mst. Laila Zehra and Talha Moin have impugned order dated 03.03.2025 passed by Ex-Officio Justice of Peace/VI Additional Sessions Judge Karachi Central in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.492/2025 whereby learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace issued directions to SHO P.S. Samanabad to record statement of respondent No.2 Karim Bux and if cognizable offence is made out then the same may be incorporated in the Book under Section 154, Cr.PC. Learned counsel for applicants submits that a false story has been managed by father of Mst. Abeera, otherwise she has filed Family Suit No.599/2025 against her husband Shahzaib Hafeez for dissolution of marriage by way of Khulla, which has been admitted by learned Family Judge and issued notice to the respondents. No case for abduction has been made out. Mst. Abeera also appeared before learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace concerned at the time of hearing of criminal miscellaneous application but her attendance was not marked by learned Ex- Officio Justice of Peace. On the other hand, learned D.P.G., assisted by counsel for respondent No.2 submits that cognizable offence has been made out to record statement of respondent No.2 Karim Bux under sectioni 154, Cr.PC and learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has rightly passed impugned order dated 03.03.2025.

Abeera also appeared before learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace concerned at the time of hearing of criminal miscellaneous application but her attendance was not marked by learned Ex- Officio Justice of Peace. On the other hand, learned D.P.G., assisted by counsel for respondent No.2 submits that cognizable offence has been made out to record statement of respondent No.2 Karim Bux under sectioni 154, Cr.PC and learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has rightly passed impugned order dated 03.03.2025. He supports the impugned order. Heard learned counsel for applicant, learned D.P.G. as well as counsel for respondent No.2 and perused the material available on record. It is the case of respondent No.2 that applicants/ proposed accused have abducted his daughter Mst. Abeera but record reflects that she filed Family Suit No.599/2025 against her husband Shahzaib Hafeez for dissolution of marriage by way of Khulla, which is pending adjudication before learned Family Judge/Judicial Magistrate, Karachi East. In view of such circumstances, no case for abduction of Mst. Abeera daughter of respondent No.2 has been made out. It appears that a false story has been managed by respondent No.2 in order to falsely rope the applicants in a false criminal case. Therefore, instant criminal miscellaneous application is allowed and the impugned order dated 03.03.2025 passed by Ex-Officio Justice of Peace/VI Additional Sessions Judge Karachi Central in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.492/2025 is set aside. Instant criminal miscellaneous application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
